title: Smoky Flaky Teff Pancake
description: A low-calorie-friendly crowd-pleaser Ethiopian dish featuring blackcurrant jam and cured meats, served as a breakfast treat with flaky teff pancakes.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup blackcurrant jam, at room temperature
A few slices of cured meats

instructions: Combine teff flour and salt in a large bowl.
In another bowl, beat eggs. Gradually add water to the egg mixture while stirring continuously until smooth.
Gradually stir the wet ingredients into the dry ones until just combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Pour batter onto the hot pan for each pancake, about 1/4 cup per pancake, and cook until bubbles form on top and bottoms are golden brown, flipping once.
While pancakes are cooking, prepare tahini sauce by mixing tahini with a little water to make a smooth paste.
Serve the teff pancakes hot with blackcurrant jam and drizzled with tahini sauce. Garnish with slices of cured meats if desired.
